name: Folding Cloth
description: Interactive coaching course for folding cloth compiled in real-time from webcam footage.

steps.name: Preparing the Cloth
steps.description: Select a clean, rectangular piece of cloth and hold it open horizontally with both hands to inspect its shape and ensure there are no deep creases before starting the fold.
steps.voice_guideline: Step 1: Preparing the Cloth. Hold the rectangular cloth open horizontally with both hands, making sure it is flat and taut.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of hands holding a clean piece of rectangular blue woven fabric open and flat.

checklist.title: Cloth Taut and Flat
checklist.description: The cloth is held flat and taut between both hands, showing its full width.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: The cloth is crumpled or held unevenly, which can lead to misaligned folds later.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Gently shake the cloth out and hold it by the top two corners to let gravity straighten it.

steps.name: First Half Fold
steps.description: Fold the cloth neatly in half horizontally, ensuring that the top and bottom edges align perfectly with each other.
steps.voice_guideline: Step 2: Fold in Half. Fold the cloth horizontally, matching the top and bottom edges exactly, and smooth out the crease.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of a fabric sheet neatly folded in half horizontally, with arrows showing alignment.

checklist.title: Edges Aligned
checklist.description: Verify that the top edges of the folded cloth are perfectly aligned without any overlapping or uneven margins.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: Misaligned edges can cause the subsequent folds to become crooked and uneven.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: If the edges do not align, unfold the cloth slightly, adjust the corners to match, and smooth down the fold again.
